text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we're walking through the
shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hm? It seems pretty lively over there.

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooooh, it's a raffle!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Can we?! Yeah, let's do it ri—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, we gotta get a raffle ticket first!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have to buy something from one of
the shops to get one...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So let's buy enough snacks for a single ticket,
hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so we acquire one raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We've only got one chance! Let's nab something
great, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Praying for good luck, we grasp the raffle
machine's lever together and turn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait... Whaaat?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer? What should we do with this
ticket?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! But we won it together...
choice_data_list: Take it and go on the trip with someone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Like anyone?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it. Could you hold onto the ticket for me in
the meantime, then?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We've got so much we need to work on right now,
so this isn't the time to sit back and relax at a hot
spring.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Please give it back to me when we've managed to
get everything done!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I take Special Week's hot spring ticket for
safekeeping.

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow! That hamburger steak looks so juicy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And the carrots are glistening... I just know it's
gonna taste heavenly!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, hamburger steak... That sure takes me
back...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My mom would always make it for me whenever I
had a tough day in the fields or had to shovel
snow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Did I ever tell you how unbelievably tasty my
mom's hamburger steak is when you're exhausted
and your stomach is empty?
choice_data_list: The taste must bring back memories.
The taste must bring back memories.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup! Memories of being with my mom...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: So... Trainer! Let's share this hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna create unbelievably tasty memories with
you too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, Special Week and I share an
unbelievably tasty hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Awww, I wanted to eat the deluxe carrot
hamburger steak...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Come to think of it, we've got a whole
bunch of ingredients now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So we should just make our own hamburger
steaks!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right?! All righty, let's go and buy the rest of the
ingredients we need!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wonder how many hamburger steaks we
can make...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remind Special Week several times not to polish
them all off in one day as we finish shopping and
head back.

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
A single carrot?! But what about the deluxe
hamburger steak... or even the pile of carrots...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, I guess this is better than nothing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I gotta think positively!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll cherish this single carrot and devour it for the
tasty morsel it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is slightly boosted by however
much joy a single carrot can bring.

text_block_list.name: Lottery Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Awww, man...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Darn it... I really wanted to win something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Special Week and I wallow in
disappointment.
